purpose: Strict Android Emulator evidence that a provider UI command sent from CCB Mobile is visible in the selected-agent conversation surface.
command: source tools/mobile_toolchain_env.sh && python tools/mobile_server_wide_emulator_smoke.py --source-ccb /home/bfly/yunwei/ccb_source_mobile_agent_native/ccb --force-config --provider codex --native-command-smoke --native-command /status --native-command-marker 'Weekly limit:' --gateway-listen 127.0.0.1:19303 --device-id emulator-5554 --flutter-timeout 1500

interpretation.notes: The phone sent /status into the real selected Codex pane through the server-wide gateway. The app rendered the non-local provider UI marker 'Weekly limit:' in the selected-agent timeline within 562 ms. This proves the provider-command visibility gate for the local AVD path; it does not close long-output, scroll-away, idle, recovery, or device-metrics gates.
